_bug_note: DEVBOX SCRIPT GENERATION BUG: devbox run <script> may fail with 'command not found' error. This is a known devbox regression in v0.14.x+. See issues: https://github.com/jetify-com/devbox/issues/2517, https://github.com/jetify-com/devbox/issues/2108, https://github.com/jetify-com/devbox/issues/2607. Use 'just <command>' or 'devbox shell' then 'just <command>-internal' instead. See ADR-20260131001 for details.

init_hook: echo '🛠️  Use: just dev && just airflow'
